name: Google Analytics
description: Query Google Analytics 4 (GA4) reports, properties, and realtime data

credentials_required.label: Google OAuth Client ID
credentials_required.hint: Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials → OAuth 2.0 Client ID

credentials_required.label: Google OAuth Client Secret
credentials_required.hint: From the same OAuth 2.0 Client ID page in Google Cloud Console

tools.name: get_report
tools.description: Run a GA4 report. Parameters: property_id (required, e.g. '123456789'), date_from (YYYY-MM-DD, required), date_to (YYYY-MM-DD, required), metrics (comma-separated, e.g. 'sessions,activeUsers'), dimensions (comma-separated, optional, e.g. 'date,country')

tools.name: list_properties
tools.description: List GA4 properties accessible to the user. No parameters required.

tools.name: get_realtime_data
tools.description: Get realtime analytics data. Parameters: property_id (required), metrics (comma-separated, e.g. 'activeUsers,screenPageViews')

author: freddy-schuetz
